calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Change Venue
Off Calendar Sep-10-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Thomas Nussbaum (650-697-6330; americanhydronics@sbcglobal.net) Petitioner in propria persona.
Jennifer Addams, Esq. (415-510-3363; jennifer.addams@doj.ca.gov) Deputy Attorney General for Respondents Will Lightbourne and California Department of Health Care Services.

ARGUED (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

RESPONDENTS WILL LIGHTBOURNE and CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF HEALTH CARE SERVICES' Motion To Change Venue:

Will Lightbourne and the California Department of Health Care Services' motion to change venue to San Mateo County is granted. That county is where the complained-of act by public officers - a past denial of welfare benefits to a San Mateo County resident - occurred. (CCP 393(b).) Thomas Nussbaum's opposition was late-filed (CCP 1005(b)) and is thus a nullity. In any event, the belated opposition suggested no San Francisco nexus.

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard Ulmer, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
